result.text:
I met one of my first Twitter friends yesterday! 

He quit his SWE job in 2021 and we both started building startups in public.

He was working on a screenshot API tool (ScreenShotOne) then.

4 years later, he’s at very comfortable 5 figures MRR at 80% profit margin.

He’s a really kind person and had an itch for entrepreneurship early on.

At 10, he collected precious rocks and exchanged them for fishing nets. Then he used them to catch shrimps and was making $30/day. At 10 years old!

It was a pleasure meeting you Dmytro ❤️
